Module Metadata

Purpose

Fetch metadata for one module.

Endpoints

  • GET /settings/modules/{module_API_name}

Request URL

{api-domain}/crm/{version}/settings/modules/{module_API_name}

Scope

ZohoCRM.settings.ALL

ZohoCRM.settings.modules.READ

Supported modules

Leads, Accounts and Deals

Parameters
  • module_API_name string, required
